overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a mountain trail at night. The journey progresses from an enclosed rocky path through open grasslands with distant mountain views, finally approaching and passing ancient stone monoliths and ruins under a cloudy, starlit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain trail with rocky cliff walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding mountain path with swords on back

entered.detail: tall rocky outcrop forming a wall along the right side of the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the mountain terrain
tall evergreen trees visible in the background against the night sky
grass-covered hillside sloping upward from the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow mountain trail at night, bordered by a rocky cliff wall on the right and grassy slopes on the left. The character walks steadily along the dirt path with pine trees visible in the distant background under a dark, cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path with distant mountain vistas

events.description: trail opens up from enclosed rocky passage to wide grassland with expansive sky views

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as the terrain opens to reveal distant mountains

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain range visible on the horizon under the night sky
open flat grassland replacing the sloped terrain
scattered boulders and rock formations along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The enclosed rocky passage gives way to open grasslands with distant mountains visible on the horizon. The path continues through scattered pine trees and rocky outcrops as the character maintains a steady walking pace through the expansive night landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins and monolith field

events.description: large standing stone monoliths and ancient ruins become prominent along the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing large ancient stone monoliths and ruin structures

entered.detail: tall ancient standing stone with carved markings beside the path
crumbling stone wall remnants of ancient structures

segments.scene_description: The path leads through an area of ancient stone ruins, with large standing monoliths appearing beside the trail. The character passes these historic stone structures as the terrain opens further, revealing distant mountains and scattered ruin walls under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a mountain trail at night that evolves from a confined rocky passage into an expansive landscape of ancient ruins. It begins on a narrow dirt path bordered by a steep cliff wall and grassy slopes, with distant pine trees visible under a dark, cloudy sky. As the character walks forward, the enclosed passage gives way to open grasslands, shifting the perspective to reveal distant mountains on the horizon and scattered rocky outcrops. The scene then opens further as the path leads through a field of ancient stone ruins, passing large standing monoliths and crumbling walls. Finally, the camera continues past these historic structures, maintaining a steady pace across the wide, starlit terrain toward the far-off peaks.
